meaning: n.伐木工人,木材商的佣工,短茄克衫
examples: Dad had been a lumberjack in Washington and Oregon.
He had entered grueling lumberjack competitions, and had placed often.
There was Greg Myerson, a lumberjack-sized man complete with the requisite red hair and goatee.
He grips his bat like a lumberjack grasps his axe and looks dreadfully nervous.
